records.statement: exec runs a command inside the target container and streams its stdout/stderr and propagates its exit code, matching the reference.

exec --container-id (no --workspace-folder/--config) recovers remoteUser and remoteEnv from the container's devcontainer.metadata label — which up stamps at create time — and applies them, matching the reference. remoteEnv, which lives only in devcontainer.json, is thereby recoverable without the workspace.
records.notes: #322: up writes the merged devcontainer.metadata label (single-container, Dockerfile, and compose paths); exec/read-configuration/set-up read it back via the shared container_metadata::config_from_metadata_label helper. Backed by case-exec-container-id-metadata (parity_up_exec).
